facts.statement: Vatican City covers less than 0.1 km²
Vatican City has fewer than 200 permanent residents
The Vatican Gardens cover more than 30 hectares
facts.actual: About 23 hectares, more than half of Vatican City's total area

facts.statement: The Swiss Guard protecting the Vatican numbers over 500
facts.actual: 104 members of the Pontifical Swiss Guard

facts.statement: Vatican City's highest point is over 100 meters above sea level
